# remscontent_category (Data Source)

Category data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remscontent_category" "example" {
  Title = "Title 1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `title` (String) The category title

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The category ID
